topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Digital Logic. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Embedded Systems Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Digital Logic is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
